## short bio (max 250 chars)

building open-source tools that make ai agents useful for real teams. creator of organisation.md — living memory for your org. write code, ship fast, keep it simple.

---

## introduction (markdown)

building tools that make ai agents actually useful for real teams.

i created **organisation.md** because every team using ai was re-explaining their context across chats, agents, and projects. there was no simple, git-native way to give every agent the same understanding of who does what, what's being built, and what was decided.

organisation.md fixes that. one repo, one mcp server, and every ai agent on your team shares the same living memory. no database, no hosted service — just git and markdown.

**why i need your support**

i work on this full-time alongside other open-source projects. your sponsorship funds:

- **development** — new tools, better parsing, edge case fixes
- **infrastructure** — ci/cd, testing, documentation site hosting
- **community** — issue triage, pr review, helping teams get set up

everything i build is mit-licensed and free to use. sponsoring doesn't buy access — it buys maintainer time.

**what you get as a sponsor**

| tier | what's included |
|------|----------------|
| $5/month | name on readme, priority feature requests, early betas |
| $15/month | everything above plus roadmap voting, maintainer access via issues, community discord channel |
| $50/month | everything above plus logo on readme/site, 24hr support turnaround, custom feature development (within reason), team onboarding session |

one-time contributions of any amount are also welcome and appreciated.

**other ways to help**

- star the repo, report bugs, suggest features
- contribute code — prs are always welcome
- tell your team about organisation.md

thanks for reading. every bit of support helps me ship faster.
